name: St. Landry Bank And Trust Company
description_short: Community bank serving Opelousas and St. Landry Parish since the 1890s, offering personal and business banking with modern technology and local roots.
description_long: St. Landry Bank & Trust Company is a community-based bank with deep historical roots in St. Landry Parish, Louisiana, dating back to the 1890s. The institution has evolved to combine traditional community banking values with contemporary financial technology, positioning itself as a local alternative to larger national banks while maintaining personalized service. The bank offers a comprehensive range of personal banking services including bonus checking accounts, savings accounts, CDs, consumer credit cards, personal loans, mortgages, and overdraft coverage. On the business side, they provide commercial checking, business credit cards, loans and lines of credit, sweep accounts, ACH services, and business CDs. Additional features include mobile banking apps, card controls, online banking, debit card fraud protection, and financial tools such as calculators, stock quotes, and currency converters. St. Landry Bank distinguishes itself through its commitment to community investment and local decision-making. The bank is FDIC-insured and participates in the SUM Program, offering customers surcharge-free ATM access at over 2,800 designated ATMs nationwide. Premium and Premium Plus account holders receive additional ATM benefits. The bank emphasizes security, privacy, and fraud protection through multiple channels including identity theft resources and government imposter scam alerts. As a regional community bank, St. Landry Bank is best suited for customers in the Opelousas and surrounding St. Landry Parish area who value local banking relationships and community investment. However, geographic service limitations and the lack of details about competitive rates or unique product advantages in their publicly available content represent limitations for broader consumer consideration.
services: Business loans and lines of credit
ATM network access via SUM Program
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. government full faith and credit
SUM Program membership provides surcharge-free ATM access at 2,800+ ATMs nationwide
Premium and Premium Plus account tiers eliminate ATM fees at non-St. Landry locations
Mobile banking apps and online banking for remote account management
Comprehensive product suite including mortgages, business lending, and credit cards
Strong community roots since 1890s with active community investment focus
Debit card fraud protection and identity theft resources available
cons: Limited geographic service area restricted to Opelousas and St. Landry Parish region
Website lacks specific information about interest rates, APRs, or competitive product details
Standard ATM fees apply for non-Premium account holders at non-SUM network ATMs
No details provided about minimum deposit requirements or account opening process
Limited transparency regarding business lending terms and qualification criteria
best_for: Opelousas and St. Landry Parish residents seeking personalized community banking
Local business owners requiring commercial banking and lending relationships
Customers valuing FDIC protection and community-focused financial institutions
Individuals seeking comprehensive banking services from checking to mortgages
diagnosis: St. Landry Bank is best for residents and businesses in the Opelousas and St. Landry Parish area seeking full-service community banking with FDIC protection and local decision-making. The main caveat is geographic limitation—this bank serves a specific regional market and is not accessible to consumers outside Louisiana's St. Landry Parish area, and the website lacks specific product rates and terms needed for rate-shopping comparisons.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
fdic_official_name: St. Landry Bank and Trust Company
